beats.without: Student misses a pickup-change notice posted to Google Classroom; parent learns at 3:45 PM via panicked text.
beats.with: 7:00 AM digest flagged the change. Both parent and child saw it at breakfast.

beats.without: Parent discovers tomorrow is a PA day only because a neighbour mentions it in the parking lot.
beats.with: PA day surfaced in Monday evening's look-ahead digest.

beats.without: Teacher posts an assignment to the TDSB Parent Portal; no one in the family sees it for two days.
beats.with: Assignment lands in the next morning's parent digest, already summarised.

beats.without: Parent gets a Teams notification that swim lesson is cancelled — while the child is already at the pool.
beats.with: Cancellation cross-referenced against the student's schedule; priority push fired 90 minutes earlier.

beats.without: Child casually mentions a community-program fee due tomorrow. Parent scrambles.
beats.with: Extracurricular commitments, including community programs, aggregated in the weekly digest.
